ready.label: Ready
ready.title: Ready solution workflow
ready.description: CBAM Compliance Workflows is the ready operational use case — powered by CBAM Calculation Engine for supplier data through declaration-ready evidence

pilot.label: Pilot
pilot.title: Pilot solution workflows
pilot.description: Extended use cases in structured pilot access — operational monitoring, packaging compliance and agricultural climate data workflows without implying full product availability

roadmap.label: Coming Soon
roadmap.title: Roadmap solution workflows
roadmap.description: Planned use cases that extend the same supplier evidence and documentation logic into EUDR and Digital Product Passport readiness

cbamWorkflows.title: CBAM Compliance Workflows
cbamWorkflows.problem: Quarterly CBAM preparation requires supplier-level embedded emissions data, installation information, methodology traceability and evidence quality checks that many teams still manage through fragmented spreadsheets and email threads
cbamWorkflows.approach: CBAM Calculation Engine structures supplier data collection, embedded emissions calculation, methodology notes and declaration-ready evidence into one controlled workflow
cbamWorkflows.output: Audit-ready CBAM evidence pack per reporting cycle
cbamWorkflows.targetTeam: Export compliance, sustainability and procurement teams preparing quarterly CBAM declarations

cbamConsole.title: CBAM Compliance Console
cbamConsole.problem: Once supplier data collection begins, teams need a clear operational view of evidence status, follow-up actions, calculation readiness and reporting-cycle progress
cbamConsole.approach: The CBAM Compliance Console pilot is positioned as a monitoring and coordination layer for supplier evidence, calculation readiness and reporting preparation across CBAM cycles
cbamConsole.output: Operational CBAM readiness dashboard per reporting cycle
cbamConsole.targetTeam: CBAM program leads and compliance operations coordinating multi-supplier preparation

ppwr.title: PPWR / Packaging Compliance
ppwr.problem: Packaging teams need to organize material-level BOM data, supplier documentation, recycled-content evidence and product-family logic before PPWR requirements become operationally binding
ppwr.approach: The PPWR / Packaging Compliance pilot structures packaging BOMs, supplier evidence and packaging data preparation around a repeatable evidence workflow
ppwr.output: Structured packaging compliance data pack per product family
ppwr.targetTeam: Packaging, sustainability and procurement teams preparing PPWR-aligned documentation

agriClimate.title: Agri-Climate Data Workflows
agriClimate.problem: Agricultural and commodity-linked supply chains increasingly require producer-level records, geolocation evidence, farm-level data and traceability documentation
agriClimate.approach: Agri-Climate Platform is positioned as a pilot product area for structuring agricultural climate data, farm-level records and evidence preparation workflows
agriClimate.output: Structured agricultural climate evidence per commodity scope
agriClimate.targetTeam: Agricultural exporters, commodity traders and food supply chain compliance teams

eudr.title: EUDR Due Diligence Workflows
eudr.problem: Commodity-linked supply chains need to prepare for geolocation data, supplier declarations, risk classification and traceability documentation
eudr.approach: The EUDR Due Diligence roadmap module is planned to build on the same supplier evidence and documentation logic used across the broader platform
eudr.output: Due diligence documentation pack per commodity workflow
eudr.targetTeam: Commodity importers, brand supply chain teams and compliance functions

dpp.title: Digital Product Passport Readiness
dpp.problem: Manufacturers need product-level data structures, evidence layers, component documentation and traceability logic before DPP requirements become a practical data challenge
dpp.approach: The Digital Product Passport roadmap module is planned around product data structures, supplier evidence layers and documentation traceability
dpp.output: Product passport readiness data pack per SKU family
dpp.targetTeam: Manufacturers, product compliance teams and sustainability data functions

maturity.title: Solution maturity roadmap
maturity.description: Arvenza starts with a ready CBAM compliance workflow, then extends the same evidence discipline into pilot and roadmap use cases

cta.title: Discuss your compliance workflow with our team
